title: Fluffy Tagine Cakes
description: A delicious breakfast or snack dish made with fluffy tagine, cindgylny, and garlicky flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together fluffy tagine, cindgylny, and garlicky oil.
Add salt to taste and mix well.
Add beaten egg and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 6-8 portions and shape each portion into a round cake.
Place the cakes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cakes are golden brown.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
